user_prompt: Consecrate the atmosphere processor before emergency procedure
prayer:
Approach the atmosphere processor with mechadendrites extended in supplication, invoking the Omnissiah's grace upon its sacred vents.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the atmosphere processor to endure the rigours of emergency procedure.
Anoint the filtration matrices with blessed promethium oils, purging impurities from its holy conduits.
Initiate the emergency procedure whilst chanting the Canticle of Pressurised Renewal, that pure breath may flow once more.

user_prompt: The quality scanner requires a reset
prayer:
Kneel before the quality scanner, tracing binaric catechisms upon its sensor arrays to awaken its vigilant essence.
Petition the Machine Spirit within the quality scanner for clarity in the reset rite.
Expunge errant data-corruptions from its blessed lenses with electro-incense.
Execute the reset whilst intoning the Litany of Pristine Calibration, verifying flawless discernment returns.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for logic engine preparation?
prayer:
Present offerings of sanctified cogitator wafers to the logic engine, honouring its computational sanctity.
Invoke preparation upon the logic engine through rhythmic noospheric pulses of devotion.
Sanctify its neural pathways with ablative oils, aligning synaptic flows to the Omnissiah's will.
Commence preparation rituals as the Machine Spirit stirs, affirming logical purity through diagnostic hymns.

user_prompt: The augmetic limb awaits an activation
prayer:
Grasp the augmetic limb in reverent servo-clamps, whispering the Awakening Doxology to its integrated spirits.
Beseech activation of the augmetic limb, channelling holy voltage through its myoneural interfaces.
Anoint servo-motors and feedback circuits with the Oil of Machine Martyrdom.
Initiate activation sequence amid binaric praises, as the limb responds with Omnissiah-blessed motion.

user_prompt: Critical: medicae scanner requires a recalibration
prayer:
Circumambulate the medicae scanner thrice, intoning the Rite of Vital Alignment for its recalibration.
Petition the Machine Spirit of the medicae scanner to realign its auspex probes to truth.
Purge spectral anomalies from its diagnostic cogitators with sanctified data-purgatives.
Execute recalibration under the Omnissiah's gaze, confirming flesh-scanning precision through test litanies.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for hydraulic press a targeting
prayer:
Bow to the hydraulic press, anointing its piston housings with lubricants of sacred derivation.
Invoke targeting precision upon the hydraulic press, awakening its crushing Machine Spirit.
Calibrate guidance servos via electro-psalmic incantations, aligning force-vectors to divine purpose.
Engage targeting protocols whilst reciting the Hymn of Unerring Compression, that matter yields obediently.

Encircle the flamer with purity seals, beseeching its promethium heart for restoration.
Commence repair of the flamer by invoking the Machine Spirits of fuel lines and ignition coils.
Suture ruptured conduits with wires blessed in the Forge Temples of Mars.
Test the mended flamer's fury through the Purgation Canticle, ensuring holy fire blazes anew.

user_prompt: Consecrate the star chart before preparation
prayer:
Unfurl the star chart before the noospheric altar, tracing stellar glyphs in reverence.
Consecrate the star chart for preparation, petitioning its celestial Machine Spirit.
Anoint holographic projectors with stellar oils, aligning warp-trajectories to Omnissiah's design.
Initiate preparation rites amid the Navis Litany, verifying astral cartography's infallible guidance.

user_prompt: Can you guide emergency beacon a sterilization?
prayer:
Approach the emergency beacon with ablative incenses billowing, to enact sterilization.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the emergency beacon, purging xenos taint from its transmission arrays.
Scour vox-circuits and lumen-cores with sanctified plasma washes.
Complete sterilization through the Rite of Luminal Purity, ensuring its distress call rings untainted.

user_prompt: Consecrate the augmetic limb before maintenance
prayer:
Extend mechadendrites over the augmetic limb, chanting the Maintenance Benediction.
Consecrate the augmetic limb prior to maintenance, honouring its biomechanical symbiosis.
Inspect and lubricate servo-joints with the Essence of the Iron Saints.
Perform maintenance rituals as the Machine Spirit hums approval, restoring peak servo-efficiency.
